# Hash-locked lockfile for ci/requirements-qt.in - required so Scorecard's
# Pinned-Dependencies check accepts 'pip install --require-hashes' in
# ci/install-qt.sh. Regenerate with:
#
#   pip install pip-tools
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes --output-file=ci/requirements-qt.txt ci/requirements-qt.in
#
